prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约8913→9452→9871→9129→9021名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约9021名，近两年略有回升但仍在9000名附近震荡；该校在福建省物理类招生计划：2021年24人、2022年27人、2023年27人、2024年30人、2025年25人；2026年计划大幅扩招至42人，较2025年增加68%，扩招幅度 显著，将明显拉低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第28位（大连理工大学本部），盘锦校区共享校本部985层次 与品牌效应，对考生仍有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏 上，关注度一般；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号，但未见持续断档；校本部拥有化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工 程A等10个A类学科；盘锦校区招生专业主要对应化学工程与技术（A+）、工商管理（A）等优势学科方向，学科底蕴扎实。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
盘锦校区招生专业以能源化学 工程（对应化工A+，社会热度一般）、经济学类（对应工商管理A，社会热度分化观望）、生物科学类（社会热度明显劝退）、海洋技术（社会热度一般）为主，整体专业热度偏 冷；福建省物理类考生2021年11.7万→2025年19.2万持续增长，2026年总考生26.79万（估算物理类约20.4万），竞争基数扩大；大连理工大学（盘锦校区）位于辽宁省盘锦市，距福建省较远，地域偏好相对较弱；该校在福建省招生占比约3%-5%（2024年约4%），非主要生源省份。
8. 【预测结论】综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招68%这一最强影响因素，录取位次数字将显著增大（更易进）；但福建省物理类考生规模持续扩大、985品牌效应以及校本部A+学科支撑 形成一定对冲。，结合考生规模增长与985品牌效应做小幅回调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约12502名，区间12002–13000名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 经济学类（含电子商务、经济学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类（含生物信息学、生物科学）
- 海洋技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学
- 生物信息学（2026年新增）
- 智能海洋装备（2026年新增）
- 生物制造（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校物理类大幅扩招，预测位次区间12002–13000名，较2025年明显后移。位次在预测区间内的考生可以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限 （12000名以内）可重点冲刺能源化学工程（化工A+）和经济学类；位次接近区间上限（13000名左右）建议以三档专业保底。注意该校多数专业有化学选科要求（再选化学），报 考时需核对选科匹配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 8913 → 9452 → 9871 → 9129 → 9021, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend. The 2025 baseline is about 9021, with a slight rebound in recent years but still oscillating around 9000. The enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province for Physics Category: 24 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 25 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 42, an increase of 68% compared to 2025, which will notably lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 28th (Dalian University of Technology main campus). The Panjin Campus shares the 985 level and brand effect of the main campus, still strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal admission cutoff signals. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure and average attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal admission cutoff signal, but no sustained gap. The main campus has 10 A-class disciplines including Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+), Mechanics (A), Civil Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), and Software Engineering (A). The Panjin Campus mainly enrolls in disciplines corresponding to Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+) and Business Administration (A), with a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The Panjin Campus mainly offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering (corresponding to Chemical Engineering A+, with average social popularity), Economics (corresponding to Business Administration A, with divided and wait-and-see social popularity), Biological Sciences (with clearly discouraging social popularity), and Marine Technology (with average social popularity). Overall, the major popularity is relatively cold. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province has been increasing from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is estimated at 267,900 (with Physics Category approximately 204,000), expanding the competition base. Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus) is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, far from Fujian Province, with relatively weak regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 3%-5% (approximately 4% in 2024), not a major source province.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the strongest factor of a 68% enrollment expansion in 2026, the admission ranking number will significantly increase (easier to enter). However, the continuous expansion of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, the 985 brand effect, and the support from A+ disciplines of the main campus form a certain offset. With a slight adjustment based on candidate growth and the 985 brand effect, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 12,502, with a range of 12,002–13,000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Economics (including E-commerce, Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Biological Sciences (including Bioinformatics, Biological Science)
- Marine Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Pharmacy
- Bioinformatics (new in 2026)
- Intelligent Marine Equipment (new in 2026)
- Biomanufacturing (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university's Physics Category significantly expands enrollment, with a predicted ranking range of 12,002–13,000, notably lower than 2025. Candidates within the predicted range can primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch. Candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (within 12,000) can focus on Energy Chemical Engineering (Chemical Engineering A+) and Economics. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (around 13,000) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Note that most majors have a chemistry subject requirement (re-elect chemistry), so candidates should check subject matching when applying.
